notFoundDescription: No profile for “{{slug}}”. Browse the directory or pick another disease.

identity.verifiedTitle: Identified by ORCID or a curated match — this profile is one specific person.
identity.nameMatchedTitle: Matched by name from PubMed without an ORCID — distinct people with similar names may be merged, so treat the counts with caution.

diseases.title: Diseases
diseases.sub: Areas of expertise supported by publications.

publications.title: Selected publications
publications.sub: What this specialist has actually published on these conditions.
publications.empty: No indexed publications for this profile in the catalog seed.
publications.meshMajorTitle: The disease is a major MeSH topic of this paper — it is about the disease, not just mentioning it.

recs.title: Parent recommendations
recs.sub: Family experiences PubMed mining cannot surface.

trials.title: Related trials
trials.sub: This specialist is involved in clinical-trial research. Below are active trials for this condition on ClinicalTrials.gov — not necessarily this doctor's own.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Request contact through GeneQuest — we protect direct email and include family context in the introduction.
